introSection: Big Thunder Mountain Railroad is a steel roller coaster located at Disneyland Park in Anaheim, California, USA.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Big Thunder Mountain Railroad at the Magic Kingdom in Florida is a mirror image of this ride.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: Rust brown track with the supports being hidden on the inside of the mountain.

sections.title: External links

fullText:
Big Thunder Mountain Railroad is a steel roller coaster located at Disneyland Park in Anaheim, California, USA.

Big Thunder Mountain Railroad at the Magic Kingdom in Florida is a mirror image of this ride.

Rust brown track with the supports being hidden on the inside of the mountain.




 * Big Thunder Mountain Railroad on the park's website
